disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Abrupt bilateral leg pain over ~48 hours with refusal to weight-bear in a young child
trigger_question_examples: Where does it hurt and can they walk on it?
How long has the leg pain been going on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Both legs — the shins and thighs. They just won't stand or walk and cry the moment I move their legs. It's been about two days and it's getting worse.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New non-blanching pinpoint (petechial) rash on abdomen and lower limbs, plus spontaneous bruising
trigger_question_examples: What do the spots look like, and do they fade when you press on them?
Any bruising that came up on its own?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Tiny red-purple spots all over the tummy and lower legs — they don't fade when I press a glass on them. There are also new bruises on both shins that appeared without any knocks.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recurrent fevers over the same 48-hour period
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, fevers keep coming back. The thermometer read 37.9 a little while ago but they've felt hotter on and off through the day.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Rapid-onset severe fatigue, lethargy and pallor over 48 hours in a previously well child
trigger_question_examples: How are they in themselves — energy, colour, feeding?
Are they more tired or pale than usual?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: They've gone from a normal active kid to floppy and exhausted in two days — very pale, off their food, just wanting to be held.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No history of trauma to account for the pain or bruising
trigger_question_examples: Was there any fall, injury or knock?
Anything happen to the legs before this started?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, nothing at all — no falls or bumps. It just came on by itself.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pain and fever poorly responsive to a dose of paracetamol
trigger_question_examples: Have you given anything for the pain or fever, and did it help?
Did the paracetamol bring the temperature or the pain down at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I gave children's paracetamol about three hours ago and it barely made any difference.
